items.name_cn:
Premium Grade, High Version
Medium Size 💙 Dior Toujours Denim Blue Fabric Handbag
This Dior Toujours handbag is casual, practical, and unique. Crafted from blue Denim Dior Oblique jacquard fabric, it reimagines the Dior classic pattern with an irregular stone-washed effect, showcasing modern charm. The spacious interior compartment features a matching pouch for orderly storage of daily essentials. It features a fine leather drawstring closure for secure storage and a CD Lock letter D turn-knob clasp, with adjustable sides to enhance style. The medium size features a leather handle with adjustable details, allowing for hand-carry or shoulder-wear.
Double Closure: Fine drawstring and Christian Dior Paris drawstring with CD Lock clasp
D.I.O.R. Charm
Removable Interior Pouch
Adjustable Leather Handle
Model: 2821
Dimensions: 28.5 x 21.5 x 17 cm (L x H x W)
Fits 2 wallets, 1 phone, 2 card holders, sunglasses, and lipstick

items.name_cn:
Premium Grade, High Version
 Dior Handbag Set ❤ "Calfskin Black"
This Lady Dior handbag is crafted from wine red patent calfskin, featuring the iconic diamond quilting and a removable "D.I.O.R." charm. It comes with a removable chain shoulder strap, as well as a removable card holder and zippered pouch, making it versatile for different uses. This handbag is eye-catching and can be paired with other items from the same collection.
"D.I.O.R." Charm
1 Spacious Interior Compartment
1 Slip Pocket
2 Removable Elements: 1 Zippered Pouch and 1 Card Holder with 8 Card Slots and 1 Slip Pocket
Removable Chain Strap: 120 cm
Dimensions: 21.5 x 11.5 x 3 cm
Model: 6612
Fits 1 iPhone 11 Pro

items.name_cn:
Small
👄Dior New Toujours Handbag, this Dior Toujours handbag made a stunning appearance at the 2023 Spring/Summer show. Its casual and practical design is unique, crafted from imported calfskin and finished with oversized woven quilting. The spacious interior compartment with a small pocket allows for neat storage of daily essentials. It features a CD Lock letter D rotary clasp, adjustable sides to enhance style, and a leather handle with adjustable details for easy carrying. CD Lock and strap closure with Dior charm, detachable inner pocket, adjustable leather handle, includes dust bag! Model: M1188s, Size: 23x15x15cm.

items.name_en: Small CD Signature Vanity bag blue Oblique print
items.name_cn:
Small CD Signature Vanity bag blue Oblique print
Exclusive channel goods, latest arrival
Dimensions: 16 x 11 x 9.5 cm
This CD Signature Vanity bag is a new addition to the Fall/Winter 2023 collection, practical and elegant, enriching the Travel Classic series. Crafted with blue Oblique fabric, the top and bottom are adorned with CD embossed logos, showcasing Dior's exquisite craftsmanship. The interior is elegant and spacious, featuring a double-zipper closure for a refined look. Small size, with a hard leather top handle and a removable, adjustable shoulder strap, it can be carried by hand, over the shoulder, or crossbody, making it an ideal companion for daily use.
Wide internal compartment
Double-zipper closure with zipper pull
Removable, adjustable leather shoulder strap
Leather wrist strap
Dimensions: 16*11*9.5cm
Model: 2203

Small DIOR KEY Handbag ❤
This newly released Dior Key Handbag is a key piece from the 2023 Spring/Summer Ready-to-Wear collection, inspired by the Dior archives, showcasing a retro style with exquisite fashion. Crafted from green calfskin, it features a distinctive button-style CD logo clasp inspired by a signature lock, with an internal pocket for daily essentials. Small size with slim leather handles, can be worn over the shoulder or carried by hand, matching various outfits for an elegant look.
CD Clasp
Leather Handles
Internal Pocket
Model: 0065
Size: 22 x 12.5 x 12 cm

items.name_cn:
Small Lady Dior Handbag
White Calfskin Trellis
No.: M0531ONJK_M49U
This Lady Dior handbag embodies Dior's profound insight into elegance and beauty. Crafted from white calfskin, it features a quilted texture created by trellis quilting lines, with a timeless and chic design. The brown tortoiseshell-effect resin D.I.O.R. charm complements the brand-new detachable chain shoulder strap, which alternates between light gold-finish metal links and brown tortoiseshell-effect resin O links. The small size comes with a detachable leather shoulder strap, allowing it to be carried by hand or crossbody.
Main material: Calfskin
Lining: Calfskin
Detachable O-link chain
Internal zip pocket
Can be paired with other Dior quilted shoulder straps
Includes dust bag
Made in Italy
Size: 20 x 17 x 8 cm (L x H x W)
Fits 1 wallet, 1 mobile phone, and sunglasses

items.name_en: Small Tote from the latest Qixi Limited Edition series. Sweet Qixi, a unique romantic style, is so attractive to girls. The red body is embellished with small red flowers, super gentle and sweet, helping you capture moments of love. Exquisite embroidery paired with black cowhide, sweet yet elegant. The bag comes with an adjustable long shoulder strap, preserving the simple shape while offering the large capacity of a big bag. It can be carried by hand or worn diagonally, fully meeting daily travel needs.
